title: 4 Pack 16oz Wide Mouth Glass Jars with Stainless Steel Lids, Airtight Food Storage Containers for Overnight Oats, Spices, Candies, DIY Crafts
features: 【High-quality】Food storage jars are made of BPA-free thickened glass with stainless steel lids to provide maximum durability and convenience
【Package Includes】 4 packs of wide-mouth glass jars with lids, capacity: 10 oz/300 ml, 16 oz/500 ml; measures approximately 8.4 x 8.5 cm/8.4 x 11.5 cm

【Easy to use】The glass jars are elegantly designed and the clear The glass jars are elegantly designed and the clear glass allows for easy monitoring of food levels. Each lid is professionally designed with a sealing ring for better airtight space, preventing food from getting soggy and for longer freshness and longer storage time

【Multipurpose】Use for baby food, jams or jellies, spices, honey, cosmetics or homemade candles. Great for wedding favors, shower favors, party favors or other homemade gifts. Try filling them with bath salts, body butter, candies, nuts, buttons, beads, lotions, essential oils and more
【After Sale Service】: If you are unsatisfied with the item, please get in touch with us. We will provide the best solution within 24 hours, and offer professional customer service for you
description: Our professional-grade glass jars combine industrial-strength functionality with minimalist elegance. The overnight oats container is designed with a wide mouth for easy use and cleaning. The glass container with lid has a flat top and bottom for easy stacking and space saving. ﻿ Endless Creative Possibilities From keto meal prep to boutique skincare packaging, these jars adapt to your lifestyle: Kitchen: Dry herbs, fermented sauces, infused oils Craft Room: Embroidery thread sorting, resin art pigment storage Wedding Planning: Guest welcome kits with candies/tea blends ﻿ Ready-to-Gift Packaging Includes 4x10oz (8.4x8.5cm) or 4x16oz (8.4x11.5cm) jars with secure foam partitions. Ships in luxury gift-ready box – just add ribbons for instant present! ﻿ Product parameters: Color: Clear Size: 8.4x8.5cm/8.4x11.5cm Capacity: 300ml/500ml Material: High-strength glass, Stainless steel lids Application: Coffee shop, juice shop, dessert shop, home, etc. Packing list: 1 x Set 4Pcs Jars ﻿ Note: 1. Do not use it if the product is damaged or cracked. We inspected each product carefully and wrapped the bubble film on the outside of the product before shipment. But if unfortunately the product you received is still damaged, please do not hesitate to contact us for a refund or replacement. 2. To sterilize the jars, place them in cold water before bringing to a boil, then allow to cool naturally. Note: These jars can withstand a maximum temperature differential of 70°C (158°F). Avoid sudden temperature changes to prevent cracking. Dishwasher and refrigerator safe. 3. Due to the different monitor and light effects, the actual color of the item might be slightly different from the color shown in the pictures. Thank you! 4. Please allow a 1-2cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Hand wash or use dishwasher. For sterilization, boil in water and let cool naturally. Safe for refrigerator and freezer use.
